channel.title: GitHub Groovy Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Groovy in GitHub

item.title: rundeck/rundeck
item.description: Enable Self-Service Operations: Give specific users access to your existing tools, services, and scripts

item.title: bregman-arie/devops-resources
item.description: DevOps resources - Linux, Jenkins, AWS, SRE, Prometheus, Docker, Python, Ansible, Git, Kubernetes, Terraform, OpenStack, SQL, NoSQL, Azure, GCP

item.title: AdobeDocs/experience-manager-65.en
item.description: This is the repository for Adobe Experience Manager 6.5 documentation. Your contributions to the documentation are welcome.

item.title: jenkinsci/pipeline-examples
item.description: A collection of examples, tips and tricks and snippets of scripting for the Jenkins Pipeline plugin

item.title: SmartThingsCommunity/SmartThingsPublic
item.description: SmartThings open-source DeviceType Handlers and SmartApps code

item.title: johnrengelman/shadow
item.description: Gradle plugin to create fat/uber JARs, apply file transforms, and relocate packages for applications and libraries. Gradle version of Maven's Shade plugin.

item.title: Netflix/asgard
item.description: [Asgard is deprecated at Netflix. We use Spinnaker ( www.spinnaker.io ).] Web interface for application deployments and cloud management in Amazon Web Services (AWS). Binary download: http://github.com/Netflix/asgard/releases

item.title: Netflix/glisten
item.description: Ease of use Groovy library for building JVM applications with Amazon Simple Workflow (SWF)

item.title: jenkinsci/job-dsl-plugin
item.description: A Groovy DSL for Jenkins Jobs - Sweeeeet!
